creator: sm@codenetworks.net
text:
Hi gents, i see the same for firefox. 


smartinez@tucho /u/h/smartinez> lldb -c firefox.core firefox
(lldb) target create "firefox" --core "firefox.core"
Core file '/usr/home/smartinez/firefox.core' (x86_64) was loaded.
(lldb) bt
* thread #1, name = 'SwComposite', stop reason = signal SIGTRAP
